series_metadata.series_description: Official correspondence of LSC Director that pertains to LSC policy or responsibilities.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding to session of General Assembly. After two year period, retain as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office for use as needed ; Electronic: Retain as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding to session of General Assembly. After two year period, retain as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office for use until the Director determines it is no longer needed; there is no specific time period to keep the materials., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
